TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Al Bianchi == Al Bianchi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. Alkawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Al Bianchi, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Bianchi mqwas biru sa Long Island City pqwsan biru seneng, New York, U.S. Al Bianchi, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1954, mqwas biru sa Bowling Green pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Bianchi hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1956, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Al Bianchi
S.PHON: == al βianʦ~ʨħi == al βianʦ~ʨħi s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. alkawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al βianʦ~ʨħi, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja al βianʦ~ʨħi mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa loŋ is~ɕlan* ʦ~ʨitj pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, new jork, u.s~ɕ. al βianʦ~ʨħi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βowliŋ ɣreen pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al βianʦ~ʨħi ħija ɣa s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnawʔ mariʔ nβa. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ al βianʦ~ʨħi
S.FORM: == Al Bianchi == Al Bianchi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. Alkawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Al Bianchi, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Al Bianchi mqwas biru sa Long Island City pqwsan biru seneng, New York, U.S. Al Bianchi, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1954, mqwas biru sa Bowling Green pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Bianchi hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. t'aring sa kawas 1956, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Al Bianchi
S.PHON: == al βianʦ~ʨħi == al βianʦ~ʨħi s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. alkawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, al βianʦ~ʨħi, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja al βianʦ~ʨħi mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa loŋ is~ɕlan* ʦ~ʨitj pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, new jork, u.s~ɕ. al βianʦ~ʨħi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βowliŋ ɣreen pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja al βianʦ~ʨħi ħija ɣa s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnawʔ mariʔ nβa. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ al βianʦ~ʨħi
